title: 24:23 芒聙聰 May 16, 2024
body_text:
24:23 芒聙聰 May 16, 2024
Update to Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171, Contingency Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1799, and the Wires Part
We updated the Sender Agreement section of Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171, and Contingency Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1799. The Sender Agreement section on the printable receipt in the Wires Application was also updated. We added a related note in the Wires Part.
We also updated the Wires Part to clarify when error messages display for prohibited countries.
Electronic Transaction Volume
Wires Part
Section 1.1, Overview of Wires
We added a note that wires are monitored in Central 1芒聙聶s Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM) system. See the Enterprise Fraud Management Part for more information on EFM.
Section 15.4, Completing the Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171
We updated images of Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171, that reflect the changes to the sender agreement.
Section 16.3, Completing the Beneficiary芒聙聶s Financial Institution Section
We clarified that if the destination FI芒聙聶s country is listed as a prohibited country, the related error message displays after the user selects 芒聙聹Next芒聙聺.
Section 16.7, Completing the Sender Section
We clarified that if the sender or third party芒聙聶s country of residence is listed as a prohibited country, the related error message displays after the user selects 芒聙聹Next芒聙聺.
Section 16.8, Completing the Beneficiary Section
We clarified that if the beneficiary芒聙聶s country of residence is listed as a prohibited country, the related error message displays after the user selects 芒聙聹Next芒聙聺.
Section 16.9, Completing the Payment Details Section
We added a note that if the beneficiary芒聙聶s country requires country-specific payment instructions that include 芒聙聹personal information芒聙聺 as defined in applicable privacy legislation, the sender must confirm that the disclosure of any personal information about an individual included in information accompanying the wire has been consented to by such individual.
Note: The sender agreements on Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171, and Contingency Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1799, have been updated to include the sender芒聙聶s confirmation that they芒聙聶ve received the beneficiary芒聙聶s permission to include the required personal information. The change was also made to the printable receipt in the Wires application.
Section 16.12, Confirming the Wire Transaction
We updated the printable receipt image to reflect the changes to the sender agreement.
Section 27.3, Creating Outgoing Wires in a Contingency Situation
We updated images of the Contingency Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1799, that reflect the changes to the sender agreement.
